# Digital Twin — Art Direct

<!-- Generated by osis twin. Last updated: 2026-04-06. -->

## Master Diagram

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        ART DIRECT                            │
│            Static, Client-Side, No Backend                   │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  LANDING                          STUDIO
  ───────                          ──────
  Hero Section                     Top Bar (back, tabs, filename)
  Upload Box ──── image ────────▶  View Mode (Devices / Tailwind)
  Example Gallery                  Frame Strip (compose)
  (5 artworks, 8s rotation)        Preview Tab (live iframe)
                                   Output Panel (copy)

  DATA FLOW
  ─────────
  File Input → Blob URL → Store (FrameState × 6 breakpoints)
                              │
                    ┌─────────┼──────────┐
                    ▼         ▼          ▼
               Frame UI   Class Gen   Preview
              (drag/zoom)  (Tailwind)  (CSS iframe)
                    │         │
                    ▼         ▼
               Store ──▶ Output Panel ──▶ Clipboard
                         (5 formats)
```

## Product Loops

### Primary: Upload → Compose → Copy

Developer has an image that breaks on mobile. Upload it, drag/zoom/pan per breakpoint frame, copy a Tailwind class string. Under 60 seconds, no account needed. The class string works anywhere Tailwind works.

### Secondary: Example Gallery

Landing page rotates 5 iconic paintings (Napoleon, Wave, Adam, Crows, Whaam) on an 8s cycle, each with pre-composed art direction across 3 breakpoints. Shows before/after — the gallery *is* the onboarding.

### Tertiary: Share the Technique

Each successful use reinforces that responsive image composition is a CSS problem, not an asset pipeline problem. Developers share the tool with their team.

## Pipeline

```
IMAGE UPLOAD
  File input (click/drag) → validate MIME → blob URL
  → extract dimensions → extract dominant color (64×64 canvas)
  → store.setImage() → PostHog: image_uploaded
  → transition to Studio (400ms)

FRAME STATE (×6 breakpoints)
  Each frame owns: scale, translateX, translateY,
  objectFit (cover/contain/fill), objectPosition, transformOrigin
  All default to neutral values. Modified set tracked separately.

USER MANIPULATION
  Click frame → activate
  Drag → pan (object-position in cover, translate in contain/fill)
  Wheel → pan (no modifier) or zoom (ctrl/cmd)
  Pinch → zoom (touch)
  Corner handles → scale (contain/fill only)
  Fit toggle → cycle cover → contain → fill

CLASS STRING GENERATION
  Sort frames by breakpoint order
  Base frame emits unprefixed classes
  Each subsequent frame emits only diffs, prefixed (sm:, md:, etc.)
  Explicit resets when returning to defaults
  Arbitrary values for non-standard numbers: scale-[2.9]

OUTPUT RENDERING (5 formats)
  img         → <img src="..." class="..." />
  nextjs      → <Image src={var} className="..." />
  bg-div      → <div class="bg-[url(...)] ..." />
  css         → @media blocks with raw CSS properties
  agent       → plain-text prompt for AI agents
```

## Systems

### Store (store.svelte.ts)
**Job:** Single source of truth for all studio state.

Owns image state, 6 frame states, active breakpoint, output format, view mode, device selections, orientations, modified breakpoint tracking. Derived values include `classString`, `activeFrame`, `visibleFrames`. All reactivity via Svelte 5 runes (`$state`, `$derived`, `$effect`). No external state library.

**Maturity:** Working.

### Class Generator (class-generator.ts)
**Job:** Convert FrameState array → minimal Tailwind class string.

Handles cascading (only emit diffs), arbitrary values, standard Tailwind scales, explicit resets. Unit tested. The core IP of the product.

**Maturity:** Working, tested.

### Breakpoints & Devices (breakpoints.ts, devices.ts)
**Job:** Define the responsive grid.

6 Tailwind breakpoints (base through 2xl) with display widths for the frame strip. 15 device presets across phone/tablet/desktop categories with orientation toggle support.

**Maturity:** Working.

### Frame Manipulation (Frame.svelte)
**Job:** Interactive canvas for per-breakpoint image composition.

Pointer capture for drag, wheel for zoom/pan, touch pinch, corner scale handles. Ghost image shows overflow on hover/drag. Cover mode uses object-position; contain/fill use scale+translate. Snaps to integers on release.

**Maturity:** Working.

### Frame Strip (EditView.svelte)
**Job:** Scrollable/pannable horizontal strip of frames.

Selected frame gets 1.4x focus boost, others shrink to 0.85x. Smooth 300ms transitions. Horizontal pan via drag or wheel. Auto-centers active frame on mobile.

**Maturity:** Working.

### Output Panel (OutputPanel.svelte, format-renderer.ts)
**Job:** Display, format, and copy the class string.

Collapsed pill shows truncated output with syntax highlighting (last-modified breakpoint in bright). Expands to full output with format picker. Copy button with confirmation state.

**Maturity:** Working.

### Preview (Preview.svelte)
**Job:** Live responsive preview with resizable viewport.

7 device presets. Resizable via drag handles (X, Y, corner). Sandboxed iframe renders CSS-only transforms from frame data. Blob URL converted to data URL for iframe access.

**Maturity:** Working.

### Landing Page (Hero.svelte, UploadBox.svelte, ExampleGallery.svelte)
**Job:** Pitch, demonstrate, convert.

Hero with serif heading + problem/solution copy. Dashed upload box with drag feedback. Gallery rotates 5 artworks with before/after transitions and progress bar. Staggered entrance animations. Background gradient shifts per artwork with grain overlay.

**Maturity:** Working.

### Image Upload & Color (upload.ts, color-extractor.ts)
**Job:** Handle file input, extract metadata and dominant color.

Blob URL creation, dimension extraction, dominant color via 64×64 canvas quantization. Color drives studio background gradient. Fallback to Art Direct blue (#b8dbff).

**Maturity:** Working.

### Styling System (global.css)
**Job:** Design tokens and visual identity.

Custom color scales (art-50 through art-700), landing and studio surface tokens. Fonts: Instrument Serif (display), Manrope (body), JetBrains Mono (code/UI). SVG fractal noise grain overlay. Landing entrance animations (rise, fade, scale). Tailwind v4 @theme integration.

**Maturity:** Working.

### Analytics (PostHog)
**Job:** Usage tracking.

Events: image_uploaded, studio_entered, frame_adjusted (2s debounce), output_copied, output_format_changed, view_mode_changed, studio_tab_switched, session_reset, gallery_example_navigated, output_panel_expanded. Embedded script, no server-side.

**Maturity:** Working.

## Actors

| Actor | Role | What Flows |
|-------|------|------------|
| Developer | Primary user | Uploads image, manipulates frames, copies output |
| Store | State manager | User actions in → derived values out |
| Class Generator | Engine | Modified frames → Tailwind class string |
| Format Renderer | Engine | Class string + format → copyable output |
| Frame Component | Canvas | Gestures → FrameState updates |
| Preview | Verifier | Frame data → live CSS preview |
| PostHog | Analytics | User events → usage insights |

## Architecture

- **Astro 6.1** static site with **Svelte 5** islands (`client:load`)
- **Tailwind CSS v4** via `@tailwindcss/vite`, custom @theme tokens
- **TypeScript 5.9**, **Bun** for package management and scripts
- **Vitest** for unit tests (class generator coverage)
- **No backend, no persistence** — blob URLs, ephemeral sessions
- **No external APIs** — all processing client-side
- **PostHog** embedded for analytics
- Component isolation: Frame, EditView, Studio, App each own their domain
- Unidirectional data flow: action → store → derived → render

## Product Maturity

| Area | Status |
|------|--------|
| Upload & image handling | Working |
| Frame state & store | Working |
| Class generation | Working, tested |
| Frame manipulation (all gestures) | Working |
| Frame strip layout | Working |
| Preview tab | Working |
| Output formats (5) | Working |
| Landing page & gallery | Working |
| Styling & design system | Working |
| Analytics | Working |
| Mobile UI | Working |
| Accessibility | Partial (aria labels, minimal keyboard nav) |
| Persistence | Not implemented (by design for v1) |

**Overall:** Feature-complete for Phase 1 MVP. All core loops functional. Ready for public use.
